title: Intense Pull Uruguayan Cheese Bento-Box
description: A post-workout Uruguayan dish featuring soy sauce and herbal flavors, carefully prepared to meet diabetic-friendly requirements.

ingredients.name: Grilled beef strips
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced beef for easy pull

ingredients.name: Uruguayan cheese
ingredients.notes: High protein cheese for muscle recovery

ingredients.name: Chimichurri sauce
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought for added flavor

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, chimichurri sauce, and minced parsley.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat and cook the beef strips for 3-4 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, toast or grill the whole wheat brioche for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
In a separate pan, warm the Uruguayan cheese over low heat until melted.
Assemble the bento-box by placing the grilled beef strips on top of the toasted brioche, followed by the melted cheese, mixed greens, and a drizzle of the soy sauce-chimichurri sauce mixture.
Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint and serve immediately.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Serve in a colorful bento-box to add a pop of color and fun to the post-workout meal.
